data.markdown:
# Okta secures AI

And every other identity, from machine to human.

[Get startedopens in a new tab](https://www.okta.com/free-trial/)

[Contact salesopens in a new tab](https://www.okta.com/contact-sales/)

### AI SECURITY STARTS HERE

### Get expert resources for your AI strategy

[Explore the hub](https://www.okta.com/blog/ai-resources/)

### To get AI agent security right, you have to get identity right

Our neutral and extensible platforms let you secure the identity of every AI agent across its full lifecycle.

[Learn more](https://www.okta.com/solutions/secure-ai/)

### Secure all of your identities within an identity security fabric

- Gain end-to-end visibility with proactive remediation.
- Simplify your governance and compliance requirements.

[Secure your identities](https://www.okta.com/products/workforce-identity/)

### Ship amazing experiences with enterprise-grade customer identity

- Prevent fraud, battle bots, and detect threats quickly.
- Customize and extend your identity flows easily.

[Build amazing experiences](https://www.okta.com/products/customer-identity/)

## Securing Fortune 100s, governments, and industries around the world

[View all stories](https://www.okta.com/customers/)

### McLaren Racing speeds toward seamless fan and partner experiences with Okta.

65%

growth in number of partner users being onboarded

[See full story](https://www.okta.com/customers/mclaren/)

### Wyndham Hotels & Resorts gives 100 million users an unforgettable digital experience with Okta.

100M

users on one platform

85%

reduction in development labor costs

[See full story](https://www.okta.com/customers/wyndham-hotels/)

### Hitachi unifies governance and access for ~480,000 global users.

1,500

applications authenticated with Okta

41

tons of CO2 per year reduced by eliminating on-premise servers

[See full story](https://www.okta.com/customers/hitachi/)

### With the Okta-powered TakedaID platform, Takeda delivers increased security that enables greater scalability.

3.6M

providers and patients using TakedaID

500

authentications per minute

[See full story](https://www.okta.com/customers/takeda/)

### From chocolates to Chihuahuas: Okta helps Mars securely expand their universe of brands.

100%

of users onboarded post M&A vs piecemeal integration

50%

reduction in time to onboard new applications with Okta Integration Network

[See full story](https://www.okta.com/customers/mars/)

### FedEx improves their security posture by unifying identity and building a foundation for Zero Trust.

250+

apps integrated into Okta

5

legacy systems retired

[See full story](https://www.okta.com/customers/fedex/)

‹›
